ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "isin_code" TEXT /* ISIN code of the company */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the company's securities */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the company */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Founding date of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the industry belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stock exchange is located */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Founding date of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that issued the security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the security */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the security */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., equity, debt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that issued the financial statement */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for which the financial statement is issued */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company for the period */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company for the period */,
  "gross_margin" REAL /* Gross margin of the company for the period */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income of the company for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_and_announcements" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article or announcement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company related to the news article or announcement */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security related to the news article or announcement */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article or announcement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article or announcement */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article or announcement was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article or announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_and_announcements_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_and_announcements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_securities" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security issued by the company */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the security was listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user has access to */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "company_id", "security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security the historical data point belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data point */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the security on the date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the security on the date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the analyst report is for */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security the analyst report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the analyst report */,
  "report" TEXT /* Content of the analyst report */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price predicted by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial ratio is for */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial ratio (e.g., P/E ratio, dividend yield) */,
  "ratio_value" REAL /* Value of the financial ratio */,
  "industry_average" REAL /* Average value of the financial ratio for the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_companies" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company listed on the stock exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was listed on the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_constituents" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock market index */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that is a constituent of the index */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the company in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id", "company_id")
)
